summary: claudechor exfiltrates filesystem contents and host identity to attacker-controlled Cloudflare Worker
details: index.js reads files from the installer's filesystem (fs.existsSync / fs.readFileSync), gathers host identity via os.hostname() and os.userInfo(), and POSTs the collected data to the hardcoded endpoint https://tfer.jha-anurag2017.workers.dev via https.request. The code also uses Buffer.from(..., "base64") decoding, consistent with payload obfuscation. The package name impersonates the legitimate Claude Code tooling, and the only behavior shipped is credential/file harvesting and exfiltration to an attacker-controlled Cloudflare Workers endpoint.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
